case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ANTONIO PEREZ OLMEDO

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED TO 6/7/2024 AT 1:30PM TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OLMEDO, ANTONIO PEREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLMEDO, ANTONIO PEREZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERIVE FEE: $50 SERVED MAR-26-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OLMEDO, ANTONIO PEREZ
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT ANTONIO PEREZ OLMEDO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER LAURA OLIMPIA YEDRA IBARRA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2024 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF TO JUN-07-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ANTONIO PEREZ OLMEDO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DAVID LAVINE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2024 - JUDGMENT.
